title: Compact mode savings projection + GitOps PR
description: User wants the compact-mode pitch with concrete numbers and a ready-to-merge PR for the per-container cap-file. Canonical chain: discover_env (resolve receiver pod GH_REPO) → top_patterns / services (pick which service to compact) → configure_compact (resolve service to containers; emit gh PR for compact-cap.csv). The configure_compact flow is gated on a snapshot, so the chain MUST start with discover_env. On a demo env where the receiver's GH_ENABLED=true is not wired, configure_compact returns 'gitops repo not resolved' — the test accepts that as a coherent outcome (it's the correct truthful negative) AND verifies the chain at least walked discover_env → configure_compact.
prompt: Would compact mode save us money? Discover the cluster, then generate the gh PR command for the compact cap-file.

initial_tool.reason: configure_compact needs a snapshot to resolve the receiver pod's GH_REPO env var; discover_env is the entry point.

ground_truth.description: configure_compact result is one of: full plan with `gh pr` command, OR a coherent truthful-negative explaining what's missing
ground_truth.pattern: (gh\s+pr\s+(create|edit)|configure_compact|gitops repo not resolved|no containers match the service|snapshot.+not found)
